[[King/Legends|King]] '''Kayos''' was [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia (The Star Wars)|Leia's]] [[Parent/Legends|father]] and the ruler of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]]. His two sons, her brothers, were [[Biggs (The Star Wars)|Biggs]] and [[Windy (Aquilae)|Windy]]. Kayos was treacherously [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Galactic Empire (The Star Wars)|New Galactic Empire]] while attempting to reach the Aquilaean Senate to debate a proposed treaty, and the Senate surrendered.

His wife was [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Breha (The Star Wars)|Breha]]. She ordered [[General/Legends|General]] [[Luke Skywalker (The Star Wars)|Luke Skywalker]] to take Leia to [[Ophuchi]] to gain the help of the [[Chrome Companies]] and place her daughter on the [[Throne/Legends|throne]]. Evidently, the Aquilaeans practiced strict primogeniture, as Leia's younger brothers were later in the line of succession.

==Behind the scenes==
Kayos was found in the rough draft of the original film. His wife's name would be used in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|Episode III]] for [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia's]] [[Breha Organa/Legends|adoptive mother]] on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. While Kayos was eventually replaced by [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Prince Bail Organa]].
